roa.docketEntryComment: PD'S MOT TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL FILED
ADD TO CALENDAR FOR PRETRIAL CONFERENCE FILED
MOT FOR RELEASE ON OR FILED

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN INSPECTOR ROBERT YICK SFPD; OFFICER JOATHON LUCCHETTI SFPD    /EXHMA:PEOPLES #1, PHOTO OF PETER TOGIAI FROM DMV,PEOPLES #2, SINGLE SHEETWITH 3 COLOR PHOTOS OF A FEMALE; PEOPLES #3, PHOTOOF PETER TOGIAI FROM DMV; DEFENSE #A, 5 PAGE SUPPLEMENTAL CHECKLIST/HTA1:COUNT 2 & COUNT 8/871D:COUNT 5 & COUNT 6/BAIL:50,000/X:DA DISMISSES COUNTS 3 & 7 IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE,/AMENDCOM COUNT 4, A MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/RRC/X:COURT REDUCES COUNT 1 TO A MISDEMEANOR PURS 17BPC,/CTORD:COUNT 1 &COUNT 4 AS MISDEMEANORS IS CERTIFIED TO SUPERIOR COURT,/

/CAL:OR MOTION & TO SET/X:OR MOTION DENIED/CTORD:BAIL REDUCED/BAIL:20000/CGTW/CONTD:PRETRIAL AT 1:30PM IN S23/DOP/
